# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Notification Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn,linkerd=info"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: admin
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
# API Gateway Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      name: https
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: admin
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: api-gateway

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: user-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306"
      labels:
        app: user-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: metrics
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "800m"
              memory: "512Mi"

---
# User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9091
      targetPort: 9091
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: user-service

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
            - containerPort: 50051
              name: grpc
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: metrics
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "300m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "768Mi"

---
# Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 50051
      targetPort: 50051
      name: grpc
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: order-service

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "150m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9093
              name: metrics
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "768Mi"

---
# Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9093
      targetPort: 9093
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: payment-service

---
# Notification Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "deny"
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: notification-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9094
              name: metrics
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "150m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "384Mi"

---
# Notification Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9094
      targetPort: 9094
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: notification-service

---
# ============================================================
# Server Policies - Define which ports accept traffic and how
# ============================================================

# Server policy for API Gateway - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for API Gateway - Admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for User Service - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for User Service - Metrics port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service - gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for Order Service - Metrics port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service - Metrics port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Notification Service - HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Notification Service - Metrics port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: metrics
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# ============================================================
# MeshTLS Authentication - Require mTLS for all mesh traffic
# ============================================================

# Require mTLS for any identity in the mesh
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-authenticated
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Require mTLS specifically from Linkerd Viz namespace (for metrics scraping)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: linkerd-viz-authenticated
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.linkerd-viz.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# Network Authentication - Allow probes from kubelet
# ============================================================

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
    - cidr: "::/0"

---
# ============================================================
# Authorization Policies
# ============================================================

# --- API Gateway Authorizations ---

# Allow external traffic to API Gateway (from ingress controller)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-ingress
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow health probes to API Gateway admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-health-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-admin
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# --- User Service Authorizations ---

# Allow API Gateway to access User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access User Service (for user lookups)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Linkerd Viz to scrape User Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-viz-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-metrics
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-viz-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# --- Order Service Authorizations ---

# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-api-gateway-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Payment Service to access Order Service (for order status updates)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Linkerd Viz to scrape Order Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-viz-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-metrics
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-viz-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# --- Payment Service Authorizations ---

# Allow Order Service to access Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Payment Service (for payment status checks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Linkerd Viz to scrape Payment Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-viz-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-metrics
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-viz-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# --- Notification Service Authorizations ---

# Allow Order Service to access Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Payment Service to access Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow User Service to access Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Linkerd Viz to scrape Notification Service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-viz-metrics
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-metrics
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-viz-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# HTTPRoute - Fine-grained route-level authorization
# ============================================================

# HTTPRoute for User Service - restrict methods and paths
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: PUT
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /health
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET

---
# Authorization for User Service HTTPRoute
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-route-auth
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# HTTPRoute for Payment Service - restrict to specific paths
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/refunds
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /health
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET

---
# Authorization for Payment Service HTTPRoute
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-route-auth
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# Retry and Timeout Configurations via ServiceProfile
# ============================================================

# Service Profile for User Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/.*)?
      timeout: 5s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: PUT /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/.*)?
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health(/.*)?
      timeout: 2s
      isRetryable: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Order Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/.*)?
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      timeout: 30s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: PUT /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/.*)?
      timeout: 15s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health(/.*)?
      timeout: 2s
      isRetryable: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Payment Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments
      timeout: 30s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/.*)?
      timeout: 10s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: POST /api/v1/refunds
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/refunds
      timeout: 30s
      isRetryable: false
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health(/.*)?
      timeout: 2s
      isRetryable: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Notification Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/notifications
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/notifications
      timeout: 15s
      isRetryable: true
      responseClasses:
        - condition:
            status:
              min: 500
              max: 599
          isFailure: true
    - name: GET /api/v1/notifications
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/notifications(/.*)?
      timeout: 5s
      isRetryable: true
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health(/.*)?
      timeout: 2s
      isRetryable: true
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.3
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s
